findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat (latest catalog file) vs live integrity-status GI
findings.detail: Heartbeat file 2026-04-19T17-02-18Z-atlas.json reports gi=0.73 mode=yellow; live /api/integrity-status at run reports global_integrity=0.9 mode=green (both source=live). Headline GI is not single-sourced across artifacts.

KV-backed poll ok; multiple agents unhealthy (fetch failures: ZEUS-µ3 CoinCap, HERMES-µ2, AUREA-µ2 data.gov HTTP 404, JADE-µ1/µ2). Watch-severity quiet contexts on HERMES-µ3 GDELT and HERMES-µ4 Reddit (httpOk false). ATLAS heartbeat anomalies array was empty—micro lane still shows strain.
source=live; KV true; not mock seed failure.
HTTP 200; duplicate token acknowledged (idempotent write path).

recommendation: Reconcile ATLAS heartbeat GI/mode with live integrity ribbon compute for C-286; track upstream micro fetch failures as recurring operational noise; continue monitoring KV substrate keys that remain unset in heartbeat snapshot.
